subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! As I am in a state of convalescence, there is no opportunity for a detailed letter. Your letter was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چون در حالت نقاهتم لهذا فرصت مکتوب مفصل نه نامه شما ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
